testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.ExactlyOnceTest

testcase.name: getLastSequence returns the last accepted sequence
duplicate sequence number is rejected as DUPLICATE
sequence going backwards is rejected as DUPLICATE
first write with sequence 0 is accepted
sequence gap is rejected as OUT_OF_ORDER
different producers have independent sequence tracking
expireProducer removes all state for a producer
re-sending last accepted sequence is DUPLICATE
same producer can write independently to different partitions

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:19.422 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.424 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.425 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.425 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 09:05:19.425 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 3 09:05:19.426 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.426 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.427 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.427 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 09:05:19.427 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Expired producer 1 09:05:19.428 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.428 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.429 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.429 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 2 09:05:19.429 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.429 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Expired producer 1 09:05:19.430 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.430 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1 09:05:19.431 [Test worker] DEBUG turbomq.broker.IdempotencyManager -- Allocated producer ID: 1
